pred_reason: The SWC-101 label is justified due to multiple findings identifying reentrancy risks in external calls and state change ordering. The SWC-107 label applies because several tasks specifically highlight integer overflow/underflow vulnerabilities in arithmetic operations and payout calculations. Evidence: Task 1-3 identify reentrancy risks in external calls and state change ordering; Task 5-6 and 8 flag integer overflow/underflow in arithmetic operations and maxPendingPayouts; Multiple findings reference unsafe external calls and unchecked calculations
